hero.headline: Bring a touch of the island to your home.
hero.subheading: We craft pure, natural sea salts with traditional methods, thoughtful production, and respect for the island which defines everything we do.

seaSalt.description: Hand-harvested sea salt from the pristine waters of Aruba, naturally sun-dried by warm Caribbean sun and steady trade winds. Rich in essential minerals, with a clean, bright flavor and a subtle crunch. Best used as a finishing salt: sprinkle lightly just before serving to enhance flavor without overpowering the dish.

bathSalt.description: Handcrafted bath salt made from pure AruSalt sea salt, harvested and naturally sun-dried in Aruba. Enriched with carefully selected fragrances and colors inspired by the Caribbean, available in our signature scents, including Aruban Breeze, each with its own distinctive color palette for a relaxing, immersive bathing experience. Designed to dissolve smoothly, leaving skin refreshed and transforming every bath into a moment of island escape.

retailers.name: T.H. Palm & Company
